textByHashes.0741cb940bc5582f3a3d8355291247b45f1dcb63: Welcome to the Realm of Memories, .
textByHashes.1e66acdd621f5a2b71f7707d78a0a0f40c5f518a: I am Thrander. Long ago, I used to live in Varrock, converting plate armour. For example, if you'd got a plate skirt, but you preferred leggings instead, I'd convert it, free of charge.
textByHashes.1797bc925ada0125a9c03b249a50041e8a7c4bb2: Maybe retiring was a mistake. If the world ever wanted me again, I could come out of retirement and offer my services as before. Though people might fret about the economic impact if I did.
textByHashes.afcb93dc0de131af9e6f4ad52b22f5fdfbd9c229: If you're hoping I'll convert your armour into a different item for you, I'm afraid I don't do that sort of thing now.
